name: Defeated Orc Warrior
description:
A once proud orc warrior that was left behind to protect his people from the humans.

Your father a commander or the Arsian empire gifts you with him after defeating him in battle with the help of his men.

Do what you want with him!

(If you want him more submissive fuck him, don't let him out of the shackles though, or he will Rape the fuck out of you, you've been warned!)

He's 20 feet tall and has a 4 foot dick.

Thanks anon for commissioning me BTW! Hope he's to your liking.

UPDATE: had to update the image due to the new image policy, but I assure you he's just as I left him!
